raw_title: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_en: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_zh: Twitch的数字新闻标准：在平台流媒体环境中打破新闻边界
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了Twitch平台如何建立数字新闻标准，并挑战传统新闻的边界。它关注在流媒体环境中，新闻工作如何适应新的平台规则和观众互动方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how Twitch establishes digital news standards and challenges traditional journalistic boundaries. It focuses on how news work adapts to new platform rules and audience interactions in streaming environments.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字平台如何重塑新闻实践和标准，特别是在互动流媒体环境中。
research_direction_en: Investigating how digital platforms reshape journalistic practices and standards, particularly in interactive streaming environments.
